title: pyrus calleryana var. koehnei
intro: Pyrus calleryana var. koehnei, also known as the callery pear, is a deciduous tree native to China and Korea. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The callery pear has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and fruit of the callery pear are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
